title: inpossible minecraft
description: this is a fun project i made hope you like it also it called inpossible minecraft cause i hit n and not m but idc so i kept it like that
body: this mod is a mod made with mcreator it ads scythes a few new bosses one is named the stonedrgon it also adds new armor to use and more weapons and spellbookes also to use most stuff in this mod you do not have to have op enabeld for it to work there are some new biomes and dimensions for you to explore i also made 4 new structures one is a desart theamed structure with 4 islands around it also a dark oak strucutre with a giant iron golem in it and some relly good stuff in it to make the game eazyer to be able to defeat the bosses because they are relly hard this mod can be great for some rpg modpacks also i do not care if anyone uses this mod for a modpack im am fine with that but if you copy this mod i am not ok with that
